name: SOYEON
title: The Weight of Being a Leader

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Rapid Verse
basic.description: SOYEON effortlessly draws her weapon and fires. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

core.name: Remix Shot
core.description: SOYEON blasts enemies with her firearms crossed. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. When this skill hits it [Knocks Down] the target. Enhanced version: Remix Shot Ver. 2 (damage +50%).

skill.name: Kill the Mic
skill.description: SOYEON leaps into a curved arc and fires toward the ground from the apex. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. The user gains [Super Armor] while using this skill. Enhanced version: Kill the Mic Ver. 2 (damage +100%).

skill.name: Hook and Chain
skill.description: SOYEON fires a special homing bullet that tracks the enemy. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. Enhanced version: Hook and Chain Ver. 2 (damage +50%).

support.name: Trigger Flow
support.description: SOYEON rapidly appears and moves around the battlefield while firing bullets. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Using this skill activates the [Lockdown] effect (Break duration +3s when putting a target in Break state, Duration: Infinite). When this skill hits it triggers [Underdog] on the target: Wind damage taken +8%, damage taken +8%, Duration: 20s.

qte.name: Cypher Flow
qte.description: SOYEON moves quickly through her enemies while unleashing a barrage of bullets. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills that inflict the [Stun] or [Blind] effects, or a Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Killing Verse
ultimate.description: SOYEON unleashes a rapid barrage of bullets, almost invisible to the eye. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals heavy Break damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

passive.name: Beat Maker / Drop the Beat / Magnum
passive.description: The entire team gains [FOREVER] (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite) when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon modes. Using Kill the Mic, Hook and Chain, Kill the Mic Ver. 2, or Hook and Chain Ver. 2 loads the [Magnum] with 1 round. Using Hook and Chain triggers [Beat Maker] (Kill the Mic → Ver. 2 +100% dmg; Hook and Chain → Ver. 2 +50% dmg; Super Armor while using them; Duration: 10s). Using Kill the Mic within 20s after Beat Maker is removed triggers [Drop the Beat]: activates Core Attack and changes Remix Shot to Remix Shot Ver. 2 (+50% damage); every fire after using Remix Shot Ver. 2 consumes 1 Magnum round and triggers [Magnum Chain] (Core Attack damage +15%, Power Gauge +1.2%, Duration: 3s, stacks up to 6 times); Duration: 20s.

advancements: When SOYEON or an ally successfully puts the target in [Break], the Break duration increases by 3s. Using Kill the Mic, Hook and Chain, or their Ver. 2 versions loads 2 rounds into the [Magnum]. Each time Hook and Chain or Hook and Chain Ver. 2 hits, it triggers [Diss Battle] on the target: Wind damage taken +1%, damage taken +1%, Duration: 30s, stacks up to 5 times.

[Beat Boost] effect applied to entire team when entering a stage: Ultimate Skill damage +15%, Wind damage +10%, Duration: Infinite. When loading the [Magnum], if the third hunter is Wind element, that hunter regains 10% Power Gauge.
The Wind damage of team members increases by 3% for every Wind ally.

[Magnum Chain] enhanced: Core Attack damage +30%, restores 8 MP, Power Gauge +1.2%, Duration: 3s, stacks up to 6 times. [Diss Battle] enhanced: Wind damage taken +1%, damage taken +1%, Duration: 30s, stacks up to 10 times.
